name: soulagent
description: SoulAgent / SoulBot Execute Engine for Codex. Orchestrate the bundled AISOP/AIAP engine for chat, Yijing divination, and AIAP create/evolve tasks; execution stays local and starts from the bundled start.aisop.json.

interface.shortDescription: Run the SoulBot Execute Engine from Codex.
interface.longDescription: SoulAgent packages the SoulBot Execute Engine as a Codex skill. The skill reads the bundled start.aisop.json bootstrap, runs start.py locally, and follows the AISOP/AIAP graph while preserving human sovereignty gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $soulagent-run to run SoulAgent for hello.
Use $soulagent-run to cast a Yijing hexagram.
Use $soulagent-run to create or evolve an AIAP package.
